name: Maria's Ischli Cookies (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz almonds or hazelnuts, finely ground
recipeInstructions:
If you cannot buy nuts already ground, grind them in a food processor. Do not overprocess to prevent them from becoming oily. If using whole hazelnuts, toast first at 400°F, remove skins, let cool, and then grind.
Combine the ground nuts with butter, sugar, and flour; mix well by hand. If the dough is too dry, add drops of lemon juice or rum. Roll into a log that's 1 1/4 inches thick and refrigerate overnight in waxed paper or parchment.
The following day, preheat the oven to 350°F. Cut dough into 1/4 inch slices and bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 15 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and cool cookies on a rack.
When cooled, sandwich two cookies together with raspberry preserves and spread chocolate icing over the top cookie. For decoration, place in fluted paper cups.
Chocolate Icing: Melt chocolate with water and sugar. Once melted, add instant espresso coffee and cook over very low heat for 5 minutes. Turn off heat, add butter, and let cool to room temperature. Do not allow it to firm up too much, as this will make spreading difficult.
Yield: 2 dozen cookies
Chocolate Icing Yield: 1 1/2 cups
